points.text: TaiMed Biologics received a TFDA drug license collection notice for Trogarzo (ibalizumab), the world's first FDA-approved monoclonal antibody for HIV, marking the final step toward commercial launch in Taiwan.
TaiMed Biologics completed Phase 2b enrollment for TMB-365/380, a long-acting dual-antibody (monoclonal) regimen for HIV maintenance therapy, with interim analysis anticipated by year-end 2026.

Acumen Pharmaceuticals nominated two Enhanced Brain Delivery (EBD) development candidates, ACU301 and ACU401, which combine JCR Pharmaceuticals' blood-brain barrier-penetrating technology with therapeutic monoclonal antibodies for Alzheimer's disease.

Acumen Pharmaceuticals' EBD candidates include a bispecific antibody derived from sabirnetug and a novel AβO-selective antibody (ACU234), designed to achieve 14-40x higher brain penetration in non-human primates compared to native antibodies.
Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. — Anti-IL-15 antibody — Vitiligo — Advancing into Phase 2b development following encouraging Phase 1b results; designed for quarterly dosing regimen.
Avalo Therapeutics — abdakibart — Hidradenitis Suppurativa — Phase 2 trial reported positive topline data; asset is an anti-IL-1β monoclonal antibody.
Avalo Therapeutics — AVTX-010 — Immune-mediated inflammatory diseases — Advancing long-acting next-generation anti-IL-1β monoclonal antibody designed to extend dosing intervals.
ImageneBio — IMG-007 — Atopic Dermatitis — Phase 2b clinical trial ongoing; asset is a receptor targeting, non-T cell-depleting, ADCC-silenced, anti-OX40 monoclonal antibody with ~5-week half-life.
ImageneBio — IMG-007 — Alopecia Areata — Proof-of-concept trial completed; Phase 2 study initiation planned.

TG Therapeutics initiated a Phase 2 trial evaluating BRIUMVI (ublituximab), an anti-CD20 monoclonal antibody, for treatment-resistant schizophrenia following positive Phase 1 data in myasthenia gravis.

Invivyd received a 12-month advanced notice of Emergency Use Authorization (EUA) termination for PEMGARDA (pemivibart), a long-acting monoclonal antibody for SARS-CoV-2 prophylaxis, effective June 29, 2027.
TG Therapeutics reported that 82% of patients in a Phase 1 study of subcutaneous BRIUMVI achieved a Minimal Clinically Important Difference in MG-ADL scores at Week 24.

TaiMed Biologics received TFDA drug license collection notice for Trogarzo (ibalizumab), the world's first FDA-approved monoclonal antibody for HIV, marking the final step toward commercial launch in Taiwan.
TaiMed Biologics completed Phase 2b enrollment for TMB-365/380, a long-acting dual-antibody regimen for HIV maintenance therapy, with interim analysis anticipated by year-end 2026.

Acumen Pharmaceuticals nominated two Enhanced Brain Delivery (EBD) development candidates, ACU301 and ACU401, combining AβO-selective antibody expertise with JCR Pharmaceuticals' blood-brain barrier-penetrating technology for Alzheimer's disease.
Acumen's EBD program utilizes bispecific antibodies derived from sabirnetug and ACU234 to achieve 14-40x higher brain penetration in non-human primates compared to native antibodies.
Avalo Therapeutics — abdakibart — Hidradenitis Suppurativa — Phase 2 trial reported positive topline data; abdakibart is an anti-IL-1β monoclonal antibody (mAb).
Avalo Therapeutics — AVTX-010 — Immune-mediated inflammatory diseases — Advancing as a long-acting next-generation anti-IL-1β monoclonal antibody designed to extend dosing intervals.

ImageneBio — IMG-007 — Atopic Dermatitis — Conducting Phase 2b clinical trial; IMG-007 is a receptor targeting, non-T cell-depleting, ADCC-silenced, anti-OX40 monoclonal antibody with a ~5-week half-life.
ImageneBio — IMG-007 — Alopecia Areata — Completed proof-of-concept trial; plans to initiate Phase 2 study.
TG Therapeutics initiated a Phase 2 trial evaluating BRIUMVI (ublituximab), an anti-CD20 monoclonal antibody, in patients with treatment-resistant schizophrenia.
TG Therapeutics reported positive Phase 1 data for subcutaneous BRIUMVI in myasthenia gravis, with 82% of patients achieving Minimal Clinically Important Difference in MG-ADL scores at Week 24.
Invivyd received a 12-month advanced notice of Emergency Use Authorization (EUA) termination for PEMGARDA (pemivibart), a long-acting monoclonal antibody for SARS-CoV-2 prophylaxis.
TaiMed Biologics — Trogarzo (ibalizumab) — HIV — TFDA drug license collection notice received; world's first FDA-approved monoclonal antibody for HIV entering commercial launch in Taiwan.

TaiMed Biologics — TMB-365/380 — HIV Maintenance Therapy — Phase 2b enrollment completed ahead of schedule; interim analysis expected year-end 2026; plans to submit Breakthrough Therapy Designation to FDA.

Acumen Pharmaceuticals — ACU301/ACU401 — Alzheimer's Disease — Nominated two EBD candidates combining therapeutic monoclonal antibodies with JCR's J-Brain Cargo technology; IND submission planned mid-2027.
Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. — Anti-IL-15 antibody — Vitiligo — Phase 2b development initiated after Phase 1b data supported quarterly dosing strategy.
Avalo Therapeutics — abdakibart — Hidradenitis Suppurativa — Phase 2 positive topline data reported; anti-IL-1β monoclonal antibody.
ImageneBio — IMG-007 — Atopic Dermatitis — Phase 2b trial ongoing; anti-OX40 monoclonal antibody with ADCC-silenced mechanism.

TG Therapeutics — BRIUMVI (ublituximab) — Treatment-Resistant Schizophrenia — Initiated Phase 2 trial as maintenance therapy following efgartigimod induction; trial builds on Phase 1 data in Myasthenia Gravis.
Invivyd — PEMGARDA (pemivibart) — SARS-CoV-2 Prophylaxis — Received 12-month advance notice of EUA termination from FDA; next steps pending regulatory guidance.
TaiMed Biologics — Trogarzo (ibalizumab) — HIV — TFDA drug license collection notice received; world's first FDA-approved monoclonal antibody for HIV.
TaiMed Biologics — TMB-365/380 — HIV maintenance therapy — Phase 2b enrollment completed ahead of schedule; interim analysis expected year-end 2026; peak sales estimated at $3–4 billion.
Acumen Pharmaceuticals — ACU301/ACU401 — Alzheimer's disease — Two EBD candidates nominated combining AβO-selective antibodies with J-Brain Cargo technology; IND submission planned mid-2027.
Avalo Therapeutics — abdakibart — Hidradenitis Suppurativa — Phase 2 trial met primary endpoints with positive topline data; anti-IL-1β monoclonal antibody.
ImageneBio — IMG-007 — Atopic Dermatitis — Phase 2b trial ongoing; anti-OX40 monoclonal antibody featuring ADCC silencing and 5-week half-life.
TG Therapeutics — BRIUMVI (ublituximab) — Treatment-Resistant Schizophrenia — Initiated Phase 2 trial evaluating anti-CD20 monoclonal antibody as maintenance therapy.
TG Therapeutics — BRIUMVI (ublituximab) — Myasthenia Gravis — Phase 1 subcutaneous formulation met endpoint: 82% of patients achieved MCID in MG-ADL at Week 24; mean 4.6-point improvement observed.
Invivyd — PEMGARDA (pemivibart) — SARS-CoV-2 Prophylaxis — Received 12-month advanced notice of EUA termination from FDA; next steps under discussion.

TaiMed Biologics — Commercialization of HIV monoclonal antibody portfolio — Trogarzo (ibalizumab) + TMB-365/380 — Trogarzo launched in Taiwan; TMB-365/380 Phase 2b completed with peak sales estimate of $3–4 billion.

Acumen Pharmaceuticals — Development of brain-penetrating monoclonal antibodies for Alzheimer's — ACU301/ACU401 (EBD program) — Option exercised with JCR Pharmaceuticals; IND-enabling activities ongoing for mid-2027 submission.
Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. — Immunology pipeline expansion — Anti-IL-15 antibody — Phase 2b development in vitiligo; quarterly dosing formulation advancing.
Avalo Therapeutics — IL-1β pathway targeting — abdakibart + AVTX-010 (anti-IL-1β mAbs) — Phase 2 data positive for abdakibart; AVTX-010 in development for extended dosing.
ImageneBio — Autoimmune/Inflammatory disease therapeutics — IMG-007 (anti-OX40 mAb) — Phase 2b in atopic dermatitis; Phase 2 planned for alopecia areata.

TG Therapeutics — Expansion of anti-CD20 monoclonal antibody BRIUMVI beyond Multiple Sclerosis — Myasthenia Gravis and Schizophrenia — Phase 1 data showed 82% MCID achievement in MG; Phase 2 schizophrenia trial initiated.
Invivyd — Commercialization of long-acting monoclonal antibody PEMGARDA — SARS-CoV-2 Prophylaxis — Facing EUA termination notice in 2027; advancing Phase 3 LIBERTY trial for VYD2311 antibody.

TaiMed Biologics — Commercialization of HIV monoclonal antibodies — Trogarzo (ibalizumab) + TMB-365/380 pipeline — Trogarzo launched in Taiwan; TMB-365/380 Phase 2b completed with potential BTD filing.

Acumen Pharmaceuticals — Blood-brain barrier-penetrating antibody development — ACU301/ACU401 (EBD program) — Option exercised with JCR Pharmaceuticals; bispecific antibodies advancing to IND-enabling studies.
Avalo Therapeutics — IL-1β pathway targeting — abdakibart + AVTX-010 (anti-IL-1β mAbs) — Phase 2 positive data for HS; advancing long-acting next-gen mAb AVTX-010.
ImageneBio — Anti-OX40 monoclonal antibody development — IMG-007 — Phase 2b in atopic dermatitis; Phase 2 planned for alopecia areata following POC completion.
TG Therapeutics — Expansion of anti-CD20 monoclonal antibody BRIUMVI beyond Multiple Sclerosis — Myasthenia Gravis and Schizophrenia indications — Phase 1 data positive; Phase 2 trial initiated.
Invivyd — Commercialization and regulatory strategy for long-acting monoclonal antibody PEMGARDA — SARS-CoV-2 prophylaxis — Facing EUA termination notice; advancing Phase 3 LIBERTY trial for VYD2311.

TMB-365/380 — Mechanism: Long-acting dual-antibody (monoclonal) regimen — Phase: 2b — Population: People living with HIV — Comparator: N/A (maintenance therapy) — Results: Viral suppression and biomarkers consistent with expectations after first two doses.

ACU301/ACU401 — Mechanism: Bispecific/monoclonal antibodies targeting soluble amyloid beta oligomers with transferrin-receptor-mediated BBB penetration — Phase: Preclinical/IND-enabling — Population: Alzheimer's Disease — Comparator: Native antibodies — Results: 14-40x higher brain antibody levels in non-human primates.

Anti-IL-15 antibody — Mechanism: Interleukin-15 blockade — Phase: 2b (following Phase 1b) — Population: Vitiligo patients — Dosing: Quarterly regimen — Status: Advancing to Phase 2b based on Phase 1b results.
abdakibart — Mechanism: Anti-IL-1β monoclonal antibody — Phase: 2 — Population: Hidradenitis suppurativa — Results: Positive topline data reported.
AVTX-010 — Mechanism: Long-acting anti-IL-1β monoclonal antibody — Phase: Preclinical/Early clinical — Population: Immune-mediated inflammatory diseases — Design: Extended dosing intervals.
IMG-007 — Mechanism: Anti-OX40 monoclonal antibody (receptor targeting, non-T cell-depleting, ADCC-silenced) — Phase: 2b — Population: Moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis — PK: ~5-week half-life.
IMG-007 — Mechanism: Anti-OX40 monoclonal antibody — Phase: 2 (planned) — Population: Alopecia areata — Status: Proof-of-concept trial completed.

BRIUMVI (ublituximab) — Mechanism: Anti-CD20 monoclonal antibody depleting B-cells — Phase: 2 (Schizophrenia) / 1 (MG) — Population: Treatment-resistant schizophrenia / AChR-antibody-positive Myasthenia Gravis — Comparator: None (open-label Phase 1) — Results: 82% of MG patients achieved MCID in MG-ADL at Week 24; mean 4.6 point improvement.

PEMGARDA (pemivibart) — Mechanism: Long-acting monoclonal antibody neutralizing SARS-CoV-2 — Phase: EUA (Terminated) — Population: Adults at risk for severe COVID-19 — Comparator: N/A — Status: Received 12-month advance notice of EUA termination effective June 29, 2027.

TMB-365/380 — Mechanism: Long-acting dual-antibody regimen (bNAb combination) — Phase: 2b — Population: People living with HIV — Comparator: None stated — Results: Viral suppression and biomarkers consistent with expectations after first two doses.

ACU301/ACU401 — Mechanism: Bispecific antibodies targeting soluble amyloid beta oligomers (AβOs) with transferrin-receptor-mediated BBB penetration — Phase: Preclinical/IND-enabling — Population: Alzheimer's disease — Comparator: Native antibodies — Results: 14-40x higher brain penetration in non-human primates.
AVTX-010 — Mechanism: Long-acting next-generation anti-IL-1β monoclonal antibody — Phase: Preclinical/Early Clinical — Design: Extended dosing intervals.
IMG-007 — Mechanism: Anti-OX40 monoclonal antibody (ADCC-silenced, non-T cell-depleting) — Phase: 2b — Population: Moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis — PK: ~5-week half-life.

BRIUMVI (ublituximab) — Mechanism: Anti-CD20 monoclonal antibody depleting B-cells — Phase: 1 (SC formulation) — Population: AChR-antibody-positive Myasthenia Gravis (n=11) — Comparator: None (open-label) — Results: 82% achieved MCID in MG-ADL at Week 24; median time to MCID 30 days.

PEMGARDA (pemivibart) — Mechanism: Long-acting monoclonal antibody targeting SARS-CoV-2 — Phase: EUA status (termination notice received) — Population: Adults at risk for severe COVID-19 — Comparator: N/A — Status: Advanced notice of EUA termination issued July 1, 2026.

TaiMed Biologics — Strategic partnership exploration for TMB-365/380 — Licensing and co-development opportunities — Company exploring global development and commercialization partnerships for the dual-antibody HIV regimen.

Acumen Pharmaceuticals / JCR Pharmaceuticals — License agreement option exercise — ACU301/ACU401 development — Acumen exercised option to advance two EBD candidates combining its antibody expertise with JCR's J-Brain Cargo technology.
TaiMed Biologics — Strategic partnerships for TMB-365/380 — HIV maintenance therapy — Exploring licensing and co-development opportunities to support global commercialization.

Acumen Pharmaceuticals / JCR Pharmaceuticals — Option exercise for EBD program — Alzheimer's disease antibodies — Acumen exercised option to advance ACU301 and ACU401 combining JCR's J-Brain Cargo technology with Acumen's antibody platform.
Avalo Therapeutics — Index inclusion — Russell 2000® and Russell 3000® — Added to indexes effective June 26, 2026, reflecting clinical progress of anti-IL-1β monoclonal antibody portfolio.
